top_signals.title: Anglo Asian to keep Aim listing ‘under review’ in push to treble copper output
top_signals.summary: An Azerbaijani miner has said it was keeping its listing on Aim under regular review as it seeks to evolve into a mid-market commodities group that is on course to more than treble its copper output over the coming year. Anglo Asian vice president Stephen Westhead told City AM that while the company was “currently [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Barriers grow for international students seeking U.S. jobs: The 'American dream ... is collapsing'
top_signals.summary: International graduates say a weak hiring market and changing immigration rules make it harder for them to achieve their American dream of working in the U.S.

top_signals.title: On Dragon Quest’s 40th anniversary, ‘it’s impossible to ignore its influence’
top_signals.summary: The famous JRPG franchise that developers around the world say set the standard for the genre turns 40 on May 27.
